title: anthropics/skills
summary: Anthropics 在 GitHub 上公开了一个名为 'skills' 的仓库，用于存储和共享 Agent Skills。该仓库旨在为 AI 代理提供可复用的技能模块，目前拥有超过 16 万颗星，表明社区高度关注。这些技能可能涵盖工具使用、任务执行等能力，有助于推动代理系统的标准化和协作开发。
summary_en: Anthropics has publicly released a repository named 'skills' on GitHub for storing and sharing Agent Skills. This repository aims to provide reusable skill modules for AI agents, with over 160k stars indicating high community interest. These skills may cover tool use, task execution, and other capabilities, helping to standardize and collaboratively develop agent systems.
